mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teaching_content (owner_id, content_type, title, options, ai_draft, content, status, source_id) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{contentType}, #{title}, #{options}, #{aiDraft}, #{content}, #{status}, #{sourceId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, content_type, title, options, ai_draft, content, status, source_id FROM teaching_content WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, owner_id, content_type, title, options, ai_draft, content, status, source_id FROM teaching_content WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND content_type = #{contentType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE teaching_content SET title = #{title}, ai_draft = #{aiDraft}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE teaching_content SET deleted = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
